## Key Commands
```bash
# SSH to ThinkPad
ssh thinkpad

# SSH to Books
ssh books

# Sync agents to all instances
rsync -avz ~/.config/opencode/agents/ thinkpad:~/.config/opencode/agents/
rsync -avz ~/.config/opencode/skill/ thinkpad:~/.config/opencode/skill/

# Run Books SPA
cd ~/marketing-hub && npx vite

# Run ThinkPad Next.js
cd ~/marketing-hub && pnpm dev
```

## Architecture
```
┌─────────────┐     SSH/RSYNC     ┌──────────────┐
│   Books     │ ◄──────────────► │   ThinkPad   │
│  (Local)    │                   │  (192.168.   │
│  Vite SPA   │                   │  100.21)     │

       ▼              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────┐
│     Vercel (Production)     │
│  marketing-hub-roan.        │
│  vercel.app                 │
│  BLOCKED: /tmp, /about,     │
│  /contact, SMTP, Stripe     │
└─────────────────────────────┘
```
